providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_STANDALONE_CGR
providerEnvVars.description: Required for export and apply when using genesyscloud_routing_queue_conditional_group_routing resource

providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_STANDALONE_CGA
providerEnvVars.description: Required for export and apply when using genesyscloud_routing_queue_conditional_group_activation resource

providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_STANDALONE_EMAIL_ADDRESS
providerEnvVars.description: Required for export and apply when using genesyscloud_routing_queue_outbound_email_address resource

providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_NESTED_TABLES
providerEnvVars.description: Allow nested tables (tables in tables) in knowledge document variations (export and apply)

providerEnvVars.name: ROUTING_QUEUE_DELAY_MAX
providerEnvVars.description: Optional; random delay 0-N seconds before queue API calls — omit value for 0-7s default (export and apply)

providerEnvVars.name: BCP_MODE_ENABLED
providerEnvVars.description: Skip E.164 phone validation during apply

providerEnvVars.name: BYPASS_CONSISTENCY_CHECKER
providerEnvVars.description: Bypass or alter resource consistency-check behavior on create/update

providerEnvVars.name: CONSISTENCY_CHECKS
providerEnvVars.description: Consistency-check retry count when BYPASS_CONSISTENCY_CHECKER is set; 0 disables

providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_BCP_OPTIMIZED_SANITIZER
providerEnvVars.description: Use BCP-optimized block label sanitizer during bulk export

providerEnvVars.name: ENABLE_EXPORTER_STATE_COMPARISON
providerEnvVars.description: Compare HCL export output to terraform.tfstate (must be true)

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN
providerEnvVars.description: Provider OAuth access token

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_CUSTOM_RETRY_TIMEOUT
providerEnvVars.description: Max time to retry reads when API returns 404 for state resources

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_AUTH_PASSWORD
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway basic auth password

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_AUTH_USERNAME
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway basic auth username

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_HOST
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway host

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_PATH_NAME
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway path parameter name

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_PATH_VALUE
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway path parameter value

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_PORT
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway port

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_GATEWAY_PROTOCOL
providerEnvVars.description: Provider API gateway protocol

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_LOG_STACK_TRACES
providerEnvVars.description: Log provider panics to file instead of crashing

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_LOG_STACK_TRACES_FILE_PATH
providerEnvVars.description: Stack trace log file path for GENESYSCLOUD_LOG_STACK_TRACES

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_OAUTHCLIENT_ID
providerEnvVars.description: Provider OAuth client ID

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_OAUTHCLIENT_SECRET
providerEnvVars.description: Provider OAuth client secret

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_PROXY_AUTH_PASSWORD
providerEnvVars.description: Provider HTTP proxy basic auth password

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_PROXY_AUTH_USERNAME
providerEnvVars.description: Provider HTTP proxy basic auth username

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_PROXY_HOST
providerEnvVars.description: Provider HTTP proxy host

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_PROXY_PORT
providerEnvVars.description: Provider HTTP proxy port

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_PROXY_PROTOCOL
providerEnvVars.description: Provider HTTP proxy protocol

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_REGION
providerEnvVars.description: AWS region where the Genesys Cloud org exists

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_SDK_CLIENT_POOL_DEBUG
providerEnvVars.description: Debug Genesys Cloud SDK client/token pool

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_SDK_DEBUG
providerEnvVars.description: Enable Genesys Cloud SDK debug logging

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_SDK_DEBUG_FILE_PATH
providerEnvVars.description: SDK debug log file path

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_SDK_DEBUG_FORMAT
providerEnvVars.description: SDK debug log format (Text or Json)

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_TOKEN_ACQUIRE_TIMEOUT
providerEnvVars.description: Timeout acquiring a token from the provider token pool

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_TOKEN_INIT_TIMEOUT
providerEnvVars.description: Timeout initializing the provider token pool

providerEnvVars.name: GENESYSCLOUD_TOKEN_POOL_SIZE
providerEnvVars.description: Max OAuth tokens in the provider token pool

providerEnvVars.name: LOCAL_STACK_IMAGE_URI
providerEnvVars.description: LocalStack image URI for provider AWS integration tests

providerEnvVars.name: LOCAL_STACK_PORT
providerEnvVars.description: LocalStack port (default 4566)

providerEnvVars.name: MRMO_CXASCODE_INTEGRATION_ENABLED
providerEnvVars.description: Enable MRMO-specific provider integration code paths

providerEnvVars.name: OVERRIDE_BCP_NAMING
providerEnvVars.description: Export flows with name-only block labels instead of type_name

providerEnvVars.name: TF_ACC
providerEnvVars.description: Terraform acceptance test mode

providerEnvVars.name: TF_GC_USER_TESTS_ACTIVE
providerEnvVars.description: Gate Genesys Cloud user resource unit tests

providerEnvVars.name: TF_UNIT
providerEnvVars.description: Terraform provider unit test mode (skips SDK authorization)

providerEnvVars.name: TF_UNIT_ROUTING_QUEUE_TESTS
providerEnvVars.description: Gate routing queue unit tests

providerEnvVars.name: USE_LOCAL_STACK
providerEnvVars.description: Route provider AWS calls through LocalStack when true
